action.reasoning: Observation: Training crashed with ConnectionResetError in SubprocVecEnv init (remotes[0].recv() failed). Stdout showed 'Training on h1hand-walk-v0' and 'Using device: cuda' repeated ~14 times. Previous DummyVecEnv runs achieved success_rate=0 but improving mean_rewards on some tasks (e.g. reach 306→1556). Predict.py normalization and per-task ckpts are correct. Analysis: Root cause is missing if __name__ == '__main__' guard — 'spawn' re-executes entire top-level script in every worker process, causing duplicate training loops, print spam, and crashes. SubprocVecEnv + EGL/MuJoCo needs spawn but was broken by this. DummyVecEnv worked but too slow for needed ~1M+ steps/task. Decision: Add __name__ guard + keep SubprocVecEnv (n_envs=16, 1M timesteps/task for ~30x more learning than iter1), larger net, fix metrics logging. This will enable real progress on easier tasks (stand/reach/pole) within time; submit_eval immediately after to validate pipeline, get updated success_rate, and measure ~1-2h iter time.
